stem: A technician needs to provide remote support for a legacy Linux-based operating system from their Windows laptop. The solution needs to allow the technician to see what the user is doing and provide the ability to interact with the user's session. Which of the following remote access technologies would support the use case?

A technician is attempting to join a workstation to a domain but is receiving an error message stating the domain cannot be found. However, the technician is able to ping the server and access the internet. Given the following information: Which of the following should the technician do to fix the issue?
A network technician notices that most of the company's network switches are now end-of-life and need to be upgraded. Which of the following should the technician do first?

MFA for a custom web application on a user's smartphone is no longer working. The last time the user remembered it working was before taking a vacation to another country. Which of the following should the technician do first?

options.text: Verify the date and time settings.

stem: Which of the following is found in an MSDS sheet for a battery backup?

The screen of a previously working computer repeatedly displays an OS Not Found error message when the computer is started. Only a USB drive, a keyboard, and a mouse are plugged into the computer. Which of the following should a technician do first?

options.text: Run data recovery tools on the disk.
Partition the disk using the GPT format.

stem: A security administrator teaches all of an organization's staff members to use BitLocker To Go. Which of the following best describes the reason for this training?

options.text: To ensure that all removable media is password protected in case of loss or theft
To enable Secure Boot and a BIOS-level password to prevent configuration changes
To enforce VPN connectivity to be encrypted by hardware modules
To configure all laptops to use the TPM as an encryption factor for hard drives

stem: Which of the following is used to detect and record access to restricted areas?

An administrator received an email stating that the OS they are currently supporting will no longer be issued security updates and patches. Which of the following is most likely the reason the administrator received this message?

options.text: Support from the computer’s manufacturer is expiring.
The OS will be considered end of life.
The built-in security software is being removed from the next OS version.
A new version of the OS will be released soon.

stem: Which of the following is the best way to distribute custom images to 800 devices that include four device vendor classes with two types of user groups?

options.text: Use xcopy to clone the hard drives from one to another.
Use robocopy to move the files to each device.
Use a local image deployment tool for each device.
Use a network-based remote installation tool.

stem: Which of the following types of social engineering attacks sends an unsolicited text message to a user's mobile device?

A user reports some single sign-on errors to a help desk technician. Currently, the user is able to sign in to the company's application portal but cannot access a specific SaaS-based tool. Which of the following would the technician most likely suggest as a next step?

options.text: Reenroll the user's mobile device to be used as an MFA token.
Use a private browsing window to avoid local session conflicts.
Bypass single sign-on by directly authenticating to the application.
Reset the device being used to factory defaults.

stem: A technician verifies that a malware incident occurred on some computers in a small office. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Update the anti-malware and scan the computers.

stem: Which of the following is a Linux command that is used for administrative purposes?

A user recently installed an application that accesses a database from a local server. When launching the application, it does not populate any information. Which of the following command-line tools is the best to troubleshoot the issue?

A small office reported a phishing attack that resulted in a malware infection. A technician is investigating the incident and has verified the following: ● All endpoints are updated and have the newest EDR signatures. ● Logs confirm that the malware was quarantined by EDR on one system. ● The potentially infected machine was reimaged. Which of the following actions should the technician take next?

options.text: Install network security tools to prevent downloading infected files from the internet.
Discuss the cause of the issue and educate the end user about security hygiene.
Flash the firmware of the router to ensure the integrity of network traffic.
Suggest alternate preventative controls that would include more advanced security software.

stem: Which of the following describes a vulnerability that has been exploited before a patch or remediation is available?
A help desk technician is setting up speech recognition on a Windows system. Which of the following settings should the technician use?

A user receives a new personal computer but is unable to run an application. An error displays saying that .NET Framework 3.5 is required and not found. Which of the following actions is the best way to resolve this issue?

options.text: Resolve the dependency through the "Turn Windows features on or off" menu.
Download the dependency via a third-party repository.
Ignore the dependency and install the latest version 4 instead.
Forward the trouble ticket to the SOC team because the issue poses a great security risk.

stem: An employee is using a photo editing program. Certain features are disabled and require a log-in, which the employee does not have. Which of the following is a way to resolve this issue?

A technician is deploying mobile devices and needs to prevent access to sensitive data if the devices are lost. Which of the following is the best way to prevent unauthorized access if the user is unaware that the phone is lost?
Which of the following is the quickest way to move from Windows 10 to Windows 11 without losing data?

Technicians are failing to document user contact information, device asset tags, and a clear description of each issue in the ticketing system. Which of the following should a help desk management team implement for technicians to use on every call?

An application's performance is degrading over time. The application is slowing, but it never gives an error and does not crash. Which of the following tools should a technician use to start troubleshooting?
Which of the following filesystem types does the Linux OS use?
Which of the following methods would make data unrecoverable but allow the drive to be repurposed?

After a recent mobile OS upgrade to a smartphone, a user attempts to access their corporate email, but the application does not open. A technician restarts the smartphone, but the issue persists. Which of the following is the most likely way to resolve the issue?

options.text: Registering the smartphone with an MDM solution

stem: Users are reporting that an unsecured network is broadcasting with the same name as the normal wireless network. They are able to access the internet but cannot connect to the file share servers. Which of the following best describes this issue?

A computer technician is implementing a solution to support a new internet browsing policy for a customer's business. The policy prohibits users from accessing unauthorized websites based on categorization. Which of the following should the technician configure on the SOHO router?

Recently, the number of users sharing smartphone passcodes has increased. The management team wants a technician to deploy a more secure screen lock method. Which of the following technologies should the technician use?

An end user's laptop is having network drive connectivity issues in the office. The end user submits a help desk ticket, and a support technician is able to establish a remote connection and fix the issue. The following day, however, the network drive is disconnected again. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Connect remotely to the user’s computer to see whether the network drive is still connected.
Send documentation about how to fix the issue in case it reoccurs.
Escalate the ticket to the next level.
Keep the ticket open until next day, then close the ticket.

stem: Which of the following provides information to employees, such as permitted activities when using the organization's resources?
A technician needs to install an operating system on a large number of workstations. Which of the following is the fastest method?
A user is working from home and is unable to access work files on a company laptop. Which of the following should a technician configure to fix the network access issue?

A technician is troubleshooting an issue in which a service runs momentarily and stops at certain points in the process. The technician needs to determine the root cause of this issue. Which of the following tools should the technician use?
Which of the following is an example of an application publisher including undisclosed additional software in an installation package?
A technician needs to map a shared drive from a command-line interface. Which of the following commands should the technician use?

A help desk team was alerted that a company-owned cell phone has an unrecognized password-cracking application. Which of the following should the help desk team do to prevent further unauthorized installations from occurring?
Which of the following is used in addition to a password to implement MFA?

options.text: Sending a code to the user's phone
Verifying the user's date of birth
Prompting the user to solve a simple math problem
Requiring the user to enter a PIN

stem: A technician is preparing to replace the batteries in rack-mounted UPS system. After ensuring the power is turned off and the batteries are fully discharged, the technician needs to remove the battery modules from the bottom of the rack. Which of the following steps should the technician take?

options.text: Ensure the fire suppression system is ready to be activated.
Use appropriate lifting techniques and guidelines.
Place the removed batteries in an antistatic bag.
Wear a face mask to filter out any harmful fumes.

stem: A technician is setting up a surveillance system for a customer. The customer wants access to the system's web interface on the LAN via the system’s IP address. Which of the following should the technician use to prevent external log-in attempts from the internet?
A technician needs to configure laptops so that only administrators can enable virtualization technology if needed. Which of the following should the technician configure?
Which of the following file types would a desktop support technician most likely use to automate tasks for a Windows user log-in?

A technician uses AI to draft a proposal about the benefits of new software. When reading the draft, the technician notices that the draft contains factually incorrect information. Which of the following best describes this scenario?
Which of the following describes an attack in which an attacker sets up a rogue AP that tricks users into connecting to the rogue AP instead of the legitimate network?
A user is experiencing issues with outdated images while browsing websites. Which of the following settings should a technician use to correct this issue?

Every time a user loads a specific spreadsheet, their computer is temporarily unresponsive. The user also notices that the title bar indicates the applications are not responding. Which of the following would a technician most likely inspect?

options.text: Bandwidth status as reported in the Task Manager
File size and related memory utilization

stem: A user frequently misplaces their Windows laptop and is concerned about it being stolen. The user would like additional security controls on their laptop. Which of the following is a built-in technology that a technician can use to enable full drive encryption?
Which of the following is used to apply corporate restrictions on an Apple device?
A user's new smartphone is not staying charged throughout the day. The smartphone charges fully every night. Which of the following should a technician review first to troubleshoot the issue?

A customer is unable to open some files on their system. Each time the customer attempts to open a file, the customer receives a message that the file is encrypted. Which of the following best describes this issue?

An organization is experiencing an increased number of issues. A technician notices applications that are not installed by default. Users are reporting an increased number of system prompts for software licensing. Which of the following would the security team most likely do to remediate the root cause?

options.text: Deploy an internal PKI to filter encrypted web traffic.
Remove users from the local admin group.
Implement stronger controls to block suspicious websites.
Enable stricter UAC settings on Windows.

stem: A support specialist needs to decide whether to install a 32-bit or 64-bit OS architecture on a new computer. Which of the following specifications will help the specialist determine which OS architecture to use?
Which of the following prevents forced entry into a building?
A technician is assigned to offboard a user. Which of the following are common tasks on an offboarding checklist? (Choose two.)

options.text: Quarantine the hard drive in the user's laptop.
Deactivate the user's key fobs for door access.
Purge all PII associated with the user.
Turn off the network ports underneath the user’s desk.
Add the MAC address of the user's computer to a blocklist.

stem: A company would like to deploy baseline images to new computers as they are started up on the network. Which of the following boot processes should the company use for this task?

A user has been adding data to the same spreadsheet for several years. After adding a significant amount of data, they are now unable to open the file. Which of the following should a technician do to resolve the issue?

options.text: Revert the spreadsheet to the last restore point.

stem: A technician installs VPN client software that has a software bug from the vendor. After the vendor releases an update to the software, the technician attempts to reinstall the software but keeps getting an error message that the network adapter for the VPN already exists. Which of the following should the technician do next to mitigate this issue?

options.text: Run the latest OS security updates.
Map the network adapter to the new software.

stem: Which of the following is the best reason for a network engineering team to provide a help desk technician with IP addressing information to use on workstations being deployed in a secure network segment?

options.text: Only specific DNS servers are allowed outbound access.
The network allow list is set to a specific address.
DHCP services are not enabled for this subnet.
NAC servers only allow for security updates to be installed.

stem: A technician is using a credential manager to safeguard a large number of credentials. Which of the following is important for using this application?
Which of the following methods involves requesting a user's approval via a push notification to verify the user's identity?

A customer wants to be able to work from home but does not want to be responsible for bringing company equipment back and forth. Which of the following would allow the user to remotely access and use a Windows PC at the main office? (Choose two.)
A company wants to use a single operating system for its workstation and servers and avoid licensing fees. Which of the following operating systems would the company most likely select?

A user is attempting to open on a mobile phone a HD video that is hosted on a popular media streaming website. The user is receiving connection timeout errors. The mobile reception icon area is showing two bars next to 3G. Which of the following is the most likely cause of the issue?

options.text: The user does not have Wi-Fi enabled.
The website's subscription has run out.
The bandwidth is not fast enough.
The mobile device storage is full.

stem: A technician notices that the weekly backup is taking too long to complete. The daily backups are incremental. Which of the following would most likely resolve the issue?

A help desk technician needs to remove RAM from retired workstations and upgrade other workstations that have applications that use more memory with this RAM. Which of the following actions would the technician most likely take?

options.text: Use antistatic bags for storage and transport.
Plug in the power supply to ground each workstation.

stem: A customer’s computer does not have an active connection to the network. A technician goes through a few troubleshooting steps but is unable to resolve the issue. The technician has exhausted their knowledge. The customer expresses frustration at the time taken to resolve this issue. Which of the following should the technician do?

options.text: Escalate the issue to a senior team member and provide next steps to the customer.
Dismiss the customer and reschedule another troubleshooting session at a later date.
Interrupt the customer and express that troubleshooting support tickets can take time.
Maintain a positive attitude and continue to ask questions regarding the scope of the issue.

stem: A company executive is currently attending a major music festival with a large number of attendees and is having trouble accessing a work email account. The email application is not downloading emails and also appears to become stuck during connection attempts. Which of the following is most likely causing the disruption?

options.text: The phone has no storage space available.
Company firewalls are configured to block remote access to email resources.
Too many devices in the same area are trying to connect to the mobile network.
The festival organizer prohibits internet usage during the event and has blocked the internet signal.

stem: A company recently transitioned to a cloud-based productivity suite and wants to secure the environment from external threat actors. Which of the following is the most effective method?
A user reports getting a BSOD error on their computer at least twice a day. Which of the following should the technician use to determine the cause?
A technician is setting up a Windows server to allow remote desktop connections for multiple users. Which of the following should the technician configure on the workstation?

A technician thinks that an application a user downloaded from the internet may not be the legitimate one, even though the name is the same. The technician needs to confirm whether the application is legitimate. Which of the following should the technician do?

options.text: Compare the hash value from the vendor.
Run Task Manager and compare the process ID.
Run the application in safe mode.
Verify the file name is correct.

stem: A technician must map a network drive on a piece of legacy equipment running an end-of-life OS. Which of the following is the best script to map the drive using simple Windows commands?

After clicking on an advertisement, a user reports that their browser is slow. A technician looks at the network connections for the machine and notices a large number of outbound connections. Which of the following actions should the technician take next?
Various alerts on a user’s Windows 11 laptop are continually interrupting the user during videoconference calls. Which of the following should a support technician recommend to best solve the issue?

options.text: Use multiple sound output devices for the various source applications.
Disable all notifications in different applications in the order they appear.
Configure the Sounds option in Control Panel to be set to No Sounds.
Set Windows Notifications settings to Do Not Disturb.

stem: Company employees do not have assigned workspaces and regularly work at different computers and physical locations. Which of the following should the company implement to maintain data security and minimize the amount of user data that needs to be transferred?

A user downloads an application with a plug-in that is designed to automatically prompt for an OTP when the user browses to a specific website. The plug-in installs without any warnings or errors. The first time the user goes to the site, the prompt does not open, and the user cannot access the site. Which of the following browser settings should the user configure?
A technician needs to install a home wireless router for a customer who wants to limit connections made to the network from the internet. Which of the following should the technician do?

A technician is installing a cloud-based productivity suite and keeps getting an error message stating that the installation is unavailable. Which of the following troubleshooting steps should the technician try first?
A user wants to dispose of a failed hard drive in a way that ensures the data is unrecoverable. Which of the following is the best at-home method?

A customer's laptop will not turn on. The customer is distraught and panicking because the laptop contains family pictures that can never be replaced. Which of the following communication techniques is most important for the technician to demonstrate in this situation?

options.text: The technician should provide the customer with the appropriate SLA agreement.
The technician should inform the customer about replacement options for an increased cost.
The technician should project confidence and maintain a positive attitude.
The technician should be dressed in appropriate business casual attire to project expertise.

stem: Which of the following security technologies is designed to enable security visibility and respond to traffic outside of the host and at the network level?

A technician completes the installation of an OS that appears to be successful. However, when the technician removes the USB drive that was used for the installation and restarts the system, the following error appears: No OS found. Which of the following should the technician do next to resolve the issue?

options.text: Reinstall the OS from a new ISO image.
Enable UEFI devices in the BIOS.
Restart in recovery mode and troubleshoot.
Install the storage drivers for the motherboard.

stem: An employee is trying to connect their company laptop to an airport’s Wi-Fi during a business trip. Once the network is connected, a pop-up window appears with the airport logo, which the employee quickly closes. The internet connection is not working properly, and the employee cannot access any websites. Which of the following should a help desk technician suggest to the employee?

options.text: Look for a wall socket with RJ45 and try to connect the laptop to it.
Tell the employee that company policy prohibits connection to public Wi-Fi.
Reconnect to the network and read the pop-up carefully.

stem: A technician installs a Bluetooth headset for a user. During testing, the sound is still coming from the speaker on the computer. The technician verifies the headset shows up in Device Manager. Which of the following would the technician most likely do to fix this issue?

options.text: Update the drivers for the wireless headset.
Replace the battery on the headset, and try again later.
Verify that the sound is not muted in the control panel.
Change the headset as the default device in sound settings.

stem: Which of the following is a protocol that provides AAA for network services?

A user's application only works with a legacy version of the OS. The OS is reaching its end of life date. For security reasons, the company is migrating to the current version of the OS. Which of the following is the most efficient way to complete the migration while maintaining accessibility to the application?
A technician needs to disable guest log-ins on domain-joined desktop machines. Which of the following should the technician use?

After using a third-party disk optimization software package, a technician restarts a laptop and receives the message No operating system found. The technician verifies that the BIOS properly recognizes the SSD. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Update BitLocker settings in the BIOS.
Turn on from installation media and repair the MBR
Isolate the system from the corporate network.

stem: A user reports that their corporate mobile phone is lost. Which of the following protects the data locally on the phone from unauthorized access?
A user receives a push notification to approve or deny a log-in request when using MFA. Which of the following describes this security measure?

An administrator is investigating a technical outage. The management team wants information that includes the summary of the outage and actions taken. Which of the following documentation should the administrator provide to the management team?

A technician is troubleshooting a print spooler that repeatedly fails to start on a Windows 11 desktop computer. The technician determines the root cause is required dependencies are failing to run. Which of the following tools is the technician using?

A user’s computer is running slowly. Web pages take several seconds to open, and applications are slow responding to user input. A technician opens the Windows Task Manager and sees the following information: Disk: 2% Network: 12% GPU: 15% CPU: 70% Memory: 97% Which of the following would a technician most likely do to resolve the issue?
A malicious actor uses multiple endpoints that are spread across multiple locations to target a single endpoint. Which of the following describes this threat?

A user decides to switch to Windows from Linux and is trying to migrate data using an external USB hard disk. However, when the user connects the cable to the Windows machine, an error message appears stating the device must be formatted before it can be used. The hard disk works as expected when connected to the Linux machine. Which of the following should the user do to resolve this issue?

options.text: Configure Windows firewall to allow data from Linux systems.
Replace the cable with Windows-supported hardware.
Apply a firmware update from the PC manufacturer.
Update the file allocation system to exFAT.

stem: An end user discovers a virus on their computer. A technician quarantines the computer, scans for viruses, and remediates the infection. Which of the following is the next step the technician should take?

An administrator requires information about a server to identify the product owner and whether it has any business-critical services. Which of the following can the administrator refer to in order to find this information?
An administrator must rename the administrator account on a Windows desktop. Which of the following tools is best for this task?
Which of the following malware types typically has very high computing resource usage?
The battery on a user’s smartphone discharges quickly when the user travels. The smartphone was replaced two weeks ago. Which of the following should a technician do first?

options.text: Replace the battery with a higher capacity option.
Provide an external battery to extend the usage time.
Ensure that the charging port is working as expected.
Look for applications that are reporting the highest utilization.

stem: A technician is securing a newly deployed workstation that only assigned users can access. Which of the following techniques should the technician do to prevent unauthorized users from accessing the workstation? (Choose two.)

An international traveler is concerned about others accessing the contents of their smartphone if it is lost or stolen. The traveler has enabled biometrics. Which of the following additional security measures further reduces the risk of unauthorized data access?

A small town’s clerk wants to work from home on a town-issued laptop. The clerk needs to be able to access documents on the town hall server. Which of the following solutions does a technician need to set up for the clerk?
A company is implementing the 3-2-1 backup rule. Which of the following should the company do?

options.text: Perform both full and differential backups.
Test the backup integrity every three weeks.
Keep all backup media on site for fast recovery.
Use at least two different types of media.

stem: A team member provides a link to an online slide deck presentation so other team members can add to the presentation. The link does not work for any of the other team members. Which of the following should the team check first?

A support technician receives a computer with a non-responsive touch pad. The touch pad does not appear to be physically damaged. Which of the following tools should the technician use to check the touch pad driver?

A user is renaming a .txt file to a .xml file. After renaming the file. Windows Explorer shows the filename as Document.xml. However, the document properties shows the type of file as: Text Document(.txt). Which of the following controls enables the user to correctly change the file type?
A technician is unable to upgrade a desktop computer from Windows 10 to Windows 11. Which of the following is most likely preventing the upgrade?

A user is unable to upload files to the corporate servers from their mobile phone when outside the office, but uploading files works without issue when they are in the office. The user briefly saw an error notification but dismissed the error before reading it. Which of the following should a technician do to determine the root cause?
A desktop technician is mapping a remote windows share \\WinNAS\shared as a local disk z:. Which of the following commands should the technician run?
A technician needs to change hibernation settings on a Windows computer by applying a batch file. Domain policies are unavailable. Which of the following is the best way to achieve this goal?

options.text: Update Power Options in the Control Panel.
Run gpupdate from a command prompt.
Use the powercfg command in PowerShell.

stem: A client reports that their browser’s home page changed. Every time they run an internet search, the results returned are from unfamiliar websites. Which of the following actions should a technician take first to resolve the issue? (Choose two.)

options.text: Check the system date and time.

stem: A Windows user is having trouble accessing a fileshare. The technician would like to confirm the username that the machine is currently logged in to. Which of the following should the technician use?

A technician follows the proper procedure for malware removal on an infected computer. However, the technician is unable to remove all the malware and decides to reload the OS. Which of the following should the technician select?
A technician is 3-D printing high strength, carbon fiber-based filament parts for a customer order. Which of the following is the most important for the technician to use?
Which of the following concepts should a technician consider when discussing confidential work projects with individuals outside the company?

A technician is reviewing an organization's current incident management policy. The organization uses a third-party vendor to protect the organization's assets with multiple tools. Which of the following service types is the organization using?
Which of the following commands can a technician use to view the contents of a single file on a Linux terminal?
A Chief Executive Officer wants to meet with remote employees in a way that will allow for collaboration and training. Which of the following software technologies is the best for this situation?
Which of the following filesystems supports read and write operations for Windows, macOS, and Linux?
A technician recently installed a program that uses several anti-piracy technologies. When the program is launched, it briefly opens and then closes. Which of the following is most likely the reason?
A computer frequently crashes after an OS patch. Which of the following actions should a technician take to prevent further crashes and look into the issue?

After a user installs a mobile application from an advertisement, the phone’s battery dies a few hours later, and it is hot to touch, even when not in use. Which of the following should a technician do first?

options.text: Run a mobile malware scan on the phone.
Ensure appropriate MDM policies are applied.

stem: After new device software for a webcam is installed, a Windows PC is experiencing BSOD. The BSOD occurs during a videoconference call. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Update the anti-malware signatures and scan the system.
File a warranty claim with the manufacturer.
Start in safe mode and roll back the device driver.
Reconnect the webcam to the computer.

stem: A technician is setting up a computer for a new user. A requirement is that the user’s documents are stored on a network location and not locally on the computer. Which of the following should the technician configure?
An end user wants to have a sales printer added to their computer. The printer is on the domain. Which of the following is the best method for the technician to add the printer?

options.text: Go to the print server and select the printer name.
Connect the laptop to the printer via USB.
Connect to the printer via Bluetooth.
Go to Local User and Groups to add the printer.

stem: Which of the following authentication methods is the best way to prevent users from frequently entering their credentials?

A secretary receives an email from the company's chief executive officer with a request to pay a vendor immediately. After the payment is made, the chief executive officer tells the secretary that they never sent that email. Which of the following social engineering tactics best describes this type of attack?

Performance on a user's smartphone is degrading. Applications take a long time to start, and switching between windows also takes a long time. Which of the following diagnostic steps should a mobile technician take first?

options.text: Restore the phone to factory settings.

stem: A user is unable to use the latest version of an application on a legacy, personal tablet. Which of the following is most likely the reason?

options.text: The tablet is infected with malware.

stem: Which of the following is used to store passwords in macOS?

A user logs in to a computer each morning and tries to print a daily report, but it will not print. The user calls the help desk, they change a setting, and the user is able to print that day but the same issue happens again the next day. Because the issue occurs every day, the issue gets escalated. Which of the following does the technician need to do so the user does not have to report the issue every day? (Choose two.)

options.text: Set the print spooler to have no dependencies.
Set the print spooler recovery to take no action.
Start the printer extensions and notifications service.
Set the print spooler to Automatic.
Set the print spooler log-on to the user’s account.

stem: A user’s computer is able to access resources on the corporate network but is unable to access internet web pages with a browser. Which of the following is most likely the reason?
A technician needs to download and install a new web browser on a desktop computer. Which of the following should the technician use to verify the installer is an authentic version?

A Microsoft OS laptop user requests an alternative log-in authentication method because they have forgotten their password multiple times. Which of the following should a technician enable to satisfy this request?

A Windows 11 Home device is receiving constant pop-ups about an urgent need to update antivirus software in order to remove a detected threat. The user has been clicking the "X" button in the window frame, but it always reappears. The pop-up includes an "OK" button to install the update and remove the threat. Which of the following should the user do next?

options.text: Click the "OK" button to install the update.
Verify the current status and settings of protection measures.

stem: A customer reports that a computer is displaying pop-ups and making unexpected sounds. Which of the following should a technician do before remediating this issue?
A company wants to use its directory database to authenticate users to its wireless network. Which of the following should the company use to accomplish this task?
A desktop technician is hardening a newly installed company workstation. Which of the following actions should the technician take? (Choose two.)

options.text: Implement a disclaimer on the log-in screen.

stem: A user takes an iOS-based smartphone that is performing slowly to a repair shop. A shop technician finds the following information: Battery charge: 25% Battery health: 90% Hotspot: On Mobile reception: ||| Roaming: Off Used space: 63.76GB/64GB Which of the following is the cause of the issue?

options.text: The device is running out of free space
The phone is not sufficiently charged.
The hotspot is degrading the performance.

stem: Which of the following controls access to certain services to ensure that administrators are not automatically given elevated permissions?
Which of the following filesystems is a successor to NTFS?

A technician needs to configure settings for password complexity and failed log-in attempts before a user is locked out. These settings cannot be changed by standard users. Which of the following MMC snap-ins should the technician use?

A customer is upgrading their workstation from Windows 10 to Windows 11. They perform a clean installation from a USB drive. After the system restarts, the installer loads again. Which of the following should the user do to complete the installation?

A user called the help desk to report an issue with the internet connection speed on a laptop. The technician thinks that background services may be using extra bandwidth. Which of the following tools should the technician use to investigate connections on the laptop?

A user is unable to log in to the network. The network uses 802.1X with EAP-TLS to authenticate on the wired network. The user has been on an extended leave and has not logged in to the computer in several months. Which of the following is causing the login issue?
Which of the following authentication methods is token-based?
Which of the following is the most secure method of preventing someone from accessing a cell phone?
When a user is in the office, web pages are loading slowly on the user's phone. Which of the following best explains this issue?

A user calls the help desk to report potential malware on a computer. The anomalous activity began after the user clicked a link to a free gift card in a recent email. The technician asks the user to describe any unusual activity, such as slow performance, excessive pop-ups, and browser redirections. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Advise the user to run a complete system scan using the OS anti-malware application.
Guide the user to reboot the machine into safe mode and verify whether the anomalous activities are
Have the user check for recently installed applications and outline those installed since the link in the
Instruct the user to disconnect the Ethernet connection to the corporate network.

stem: A customer is explaining issues with a workstation to a technician. While the customer is listing the issues, the technician is browsing social media on a smartphone. Which of the following professionalism and communication techniques should the technician be using in this situation? (Choose two.)
Which of the following file extensions are commonly used to install applications on a macOS machine? (Choose three.)

A technician is installing a new business application on a user's desktop computer. The machine is running Windows 10 Enterprise 32-bit operating system. Which of the following files should the technician execute in order to complete the installation?

A user created a file on a shared drive and wants to prevent its data from being accidentally deleted by others. Which of the following applications should the technician use to assist the user with hiding the file?
A technician is performing an in-place upgrade on a user's laptop. Which of the following is the most effective method of upgrading the workstation to the latest OS?

options.text: Utilize the latest version of the .iso file.
Back up data and perform a fresh installation.
Enter the BIOS and enable USB access.

stem: Which of the following is used to identify potential issues with a proposed change prior to implementation?
Each time a user tries to go to the selected web search provider, a different website opens. Which of the following should the technician check first?

A user receives a notification indicating the antivirus protection on a company laptop is out of date. A technician is able to ping the user’s laptop. The technician checks the antivirus parent servers and sees the latest signatures have been installed. The technician then checks the user's laptop and finds the antivirus engine and definitions are current. Which of the following has most likely occurred?
Which of the following would an administrator most likely use to automate a repetitive task via a Linux command line?
Which of the following is used to determine how many active users are currently logged in to the Remote Desktop Services?
Which of the following grants a user the minimum level of permissions necessary to perform duties?
A technician is creating an MDM policy using hardening techniques that are unique to each user. Which of the following techniques is the technician using?
Which of the following operating systems is used to join a domain?

When a user navigates to comptiaa.org , pop-up messages indicate that the computer is infected with adware. A technician scans the computer for malware and does not find an infection. Which of the following should the technician do before returning the computer to the user?

options.text: Clear the browser's cached data and recent history.
Sign in to the company's cloud workspace application.
Enable private mode for using the internet.

stem: A technician must add an external web address as a trusted site. Which of the following settings should the technician configure?
Which of the following threats is shoulder surfing an example of?
Which of the following commands is used to look up DNS records for a remote host?
A technician is working on a complex, large-scale software deployment. In which of the following places would the technician most likely reference deployment instructions?
A user hears an unexpected noise coming from their desktop computer. To troubleshoot the issue, a technician needs to open the case. Which of the following actions should the technician take next?

An organization is creating a new application. As part of the deployment, the roles and responsibilities for supporting the application need to be documented. Which of the following is designed to contain this information?
A user wants to use a USB to move a 4.57GB .pst file from one Windows computer to another. Which of the following filesystems should the USB be formatted with?

The touch pad on a user's computer is not working. When the user connects a mouse to the computer, the cursor works normally. Which of the following should a technician use to check for driver updates?

A user needs to install and uninstall software on their Windows laptop but does not need to manage user accounts. The company follows least-privilege principles. Which of the following account types meets these requirements?

A technician is helping to create a desktop backup policy for the company. The requirements include ensuring that the backups work as intended and recovery is possible. Which of the following routine tasks should the technician include in the policy to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A customer asks a help desk technician for help in selecting new computers. The customer would like to avoid expensive licensing fees but would like all files to be kept locally. Which of the following operating systems should the technician recommend?

A junior technician is working on a customer request. The junior technician cannot complete the work and escalates the issue to a senior technician. The senior technician completes the work, but the outcome does not match the customer's request. Which of the following communication techniques should the junior technician have followed?

options.text: Ask open-ended questions to verify understanding.
Maintain a positive attitude and project confidence.
Use proper language and avoid jargon.

stem: A department manager asks a technician to set up a group in a company collaboration tool that will allow users in the New York office to communicate sensitive information in a highly regulated environment. Which of the following should the technician configure in order to meet the team's needs? (Choose three.)
When logging in to a workstation, a technician notices that the roaming profile takes a long time to fully load. Which of the following should the technician check first to troubleshoot this issue?

options.text: The home folder for large files

stem: A technician thinks a computer is not receiving some settings from the corporate domain. Which of the following tools should the technician use to gather more relevant information?

A company's IT policy requires the protection of sensitive data on employee laptops, especially those taken off premises. Recently, data theft on these devices has become a concern. Which of the following security measures should the company implement to safeguard the laptops?
Which of the following should a technician consider when adding ten new high-end graphic design and animation desktops at a client site?

options.text: The proper ventilation for hazardous fumes
The interior office space's humidity levels

stem: A user brings their personal laptop into the office. They connect their computer to the docking station. When the user tries to use a search engine, the page displays the following message: This device is quarantined and is not connected to the domain. Contact the IT administrator for further assistance. Which of the following is most likely the issue?

options.text: The docking station Ethernet cable is unplugged.

stem: During a routine security audit, an employee's smartphone is flagged with several security alerts. The alerts indicate that there have been multiple failed login attempts and that an unverified application was recently downloaded. Which of the following actions should a technician take first on the employee's smartphone?

options.text: Update the smartphone’s security settings and policies.
Reinstall the smartphone's latest official OS version.

stem: A user reports that their internally hosted CRM application splash screen attempts to load, pauses for a few seconds, and then disappears. A technician installs the application software on their computer and is able to recreate the issue. When checking the application logs, the technician sees the following: Windows could not start the CRM Service on Local Computer 10169. The service did not start due to a log-on failure. Which of the following would most likely cause this issue?

options.text: The user typed their account password incorrectly.
The bandwidth available is insufficient to run the application.
VLAN settings are blocking communication to the hosted application.
The LDAP service account used by the service is disabled.
The computer does not meet minimum hardware specifications.

stem: A user reports the icons on their desktop have changed. A technician investigates and discovers programs no longer open, files are inaccessible, and file extensions have been changed. When a ransom note appears on the display, which of the following should the technician do next?
Which of the following are system folders on the macOS? (Choose two.)

An administrator is investigating a zero-day vulnerability on a core system. If the vulnerability is not patched, the negative impact to business could be significant. The vendor has released a patch, but it requires downtime to deploy. Which of the following actions should the administrator take?

options.text: Continue operations until the next change interval.

stem: A help desk technician is using a local network server for image deployment. Which of following should the technician use to connect a workstation to the server and begin downloading the image?
A technician is working on a user's computer. The technician wants to log in to the intranet on the computer without logging the current user out. Which of the following should the technician do?

options.text: Enable the pop-up blocker on the browser.

stem: A technician is assisting a user who is growing increasingly frustrated because an application continuously crashes. The technician must coordinate with another department to resolve the issue. Which of the following actions should the technician take to effectively and professionally communicate with the user?

options.text: Transfer the user to the next tier.
Ask the user to submit a formal complaint about the issue.
Continue working on the issue independently.
Explain the issue and the need for collaboration.

stem: Which of the following tools should a technician use in macOS to restore an older version of a file?
A user regularly connects their laptop to public Wi-Fi networks. The user wants to block their laptop from responding to all ping requests. Which of the following features fulfills this purpose?

A user installed a free application from an unofficial application store. Now, their smartphone displays random pop-ups and shows increased data usage. Additionally, the user cannot perform certain actions such as opening banking applications or updating their OS. Which of the following should the user do first to address the security issues on their smartphone?

options.text: Change all passwords on the device.

stem: A technician needs to apply a settings file to all user workstations. Which of the following tools should the technician use to import the file?

When a corporate laptop is connected to the company network, the laptop is able to reach external websites. However, when the laptop tries to reach any internal websites the following error message appears: Hmm... Cannot reach this page. Which of the following should a technician configure?

A technician is updating a virtual desktop. The technician discovers that a single update interferes with a business-critical application. The technician reviews the vendor website and learns that the application is EOL and will not receive any further development. Which of the following should the technician do to restore the functionality with minimum downtime?

A smartphone user unsuccessfully attempts to open an email attachment that includes an unexpected overdue invoice. After that attempt, the user notices performance issues while using the mobile browser and other applications. The user restarts the smartphone, but the issue persists. Which of the following actions would most likely resolve the issue?

options.text: Forcing the smartphone to shut down and restarting it
Deleting the email containing the attachment
Wiping the device and resetting it to factory defaults
Uninstalling and reinstalling the mobile browser

stem: A technician is helping a remote user. The technician asks the user to open a specific folder on the root directory of the computer. The user cannot find a folder with that name. The technician explains that a few settings are needed to allow the folder to appear. Which of the following should the user do to be able to see the folder? (Choose two.)

options.text: Check the box to view hidden files.

stem: A user calls the help desk to report an issue with their smartphone. After the user returns from a business trip, the user is no longer able to access email or visit websites without a Wi-Fi connection on the smartphone. Which of the following would the user do to most likely resolve the issue?
A user created a document using online collaboration tools, and the document is not available on their laptop now. Which of the following should a desktop technician do to remediate the issue?

options.text: Synchronize the remote folder with the user's laptop.
Download the file and send it to the user using instant messaging.
Install word processing tools on the user's laptop.
Connect the user's laptop to Wi-Fi.

stem: A customer must access the contents of the AppData folder, which is in the local user profile. Which of the following should a technician configure so the customer can easily navigate to this location?
Which of the following is a reason for a company to use on-premises AI instead of cloud-based AI?
An employee accidentally installs software on a company PC. The software sends data to a remote server. Which of the following best describes the software?
A technician is mapping an SMB share using the command line. Which of the following commands should the technician use?
A technician receives a ticket from a user that reads, "My computer is having issues." Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Ask the user to resubmit a ticket with more information.

stem: A client provides a large spreadsheet to a business analyst for review. When the analyst attempts to open the spreadsheet, the system freezes until the application crashes. Which of the following should a technician do next?

options.text: Run a malware scan on the file received from the client.
Validate that the file extension of the shared spreadsheet is compatible.
Review event logs for error messages relating to the application.
Perform an upgrade on the spreadsheet application.

stem: A user is trying to install 3-D rendering software on a new Windows computer, but the installation fails. An error states that the system does not meet the minimum hardware configuration. Which of the following features should the user check first?
Whenever a user clicks on a .jpg, Notepad opens and displays illegible characters. Otherwise, the workstation functions normally. Which of the following is the most likely cause of this issue?

options.text: The workstation has been infected with malware.
The default application for image files is misconfigured.
The operating system needs the most current update.
A new image editor needs to be installed on the user’s computer.

stem: A vendor normally releases security patches for its operating system on a monthly basis. An administrator receives an email from the vendor that says the vendor has published a patch for a zero-day flaw in its operating system outside of the normal patch schedule. Which of the following actions should the administrator take first in order to properly address this issue in a production environment?

options.text: Wait until the next monthly patch is issued and deploy it with those updates.
Immediately deploy the patch to all company-owned computers.
Delay the patch deployment to not interfere with the production environment.
Deploy the patch to a small number of computers in order to test it in a lab.

stem: Which of the following commands is used to determine how a packet reaches a server?
A company wants to prevent unauthorized physical access to its mobile devices. Which of the following should the company do? (Choose two.)
Which of the following is a reason to keep the air temperature and humidity level within proper limits in environments with multiple active computers and peripherals?
A government organization forbids a systems administrator from configuring any servers without the presence of another employee. Which of the following threats is the company trying to mitigate?

A developer who is using a personal laptop that is running Windows wants to leverage virtual technologies. The developer does not see an option to enable the Hyper-V feature. Which of the following is the most likely reason?

options.text: The system is not fully patched.
The motherboard does not have a TPM.
The user has not joined a domain.

stem: Which of the following data destruction methods is most appropriate to ensure that classified information on hard drives cannot be recovered?

options.text: Overwriting with a software-based secure erase program
Formatting with a low-level format tool
Encrypting the drives and storing them securely

stem: Independent contractors often work from a business's lobby. Although the business has Wi-Fi. contractors often plug in their laptops to Ethernet ports in the lobby. Which of the following should a security engineer do to most efficiently address a potential security concern with this network setup?

options.text: Configure WPA3 encryption on the Wi-Fi router.
Disable lobby ports and restrict external users to the guest wireless network.
Use a protocol analyzer to check for malicious traffic on the network.
Install signage telling external users not to use Ethernet ports.

stem: A user must perform a series of commands each day on a Linux server. The user wants to use a script to automate the process. Which of the following is the most likely file type for the script?
A support specialist must allocate a shared folder. Which of the following commands should the specialist use?
Which of the following types of malware collects and sends data to an unknown third party without the user's consent?

A technician is setting up a new work phone for a user. The company requires that all phones be compliant with business standards and be up to date on all OS patches. Which of the following should the technician use to meet the requirements?

A user submits a support ticket after receiving the following error: The technician confirms that the website loads properly on a test workstation. Which of the following is a possible cause for this error?

A user wants to use a popular search engine. When the user enters the URL in the address bar. the web page displays the following message instead of the expected search engine: The antivirus has expired. Which of the following would most likely cause this issue?

A company wants to perform an in-place upgrade of operating systems on all workstations. All types of removable storage are disabled for security reasons. Which of the following is the best way to upgrade while keeping security settings in place?

options.text: Using an external hard drive to upgrade the OS
Copying the ISO file to each workstation and executing
Setting up image deployment for PXE
Using a hardware token to access upgrade files

stem: Which of the following is the best term to describe the concept in which AI makes incorrect assumptions because of limited training?
Which of the following script types requires that the system mode is set to Unrestricted to run unsigned scripts?
A technician completes malware remediation on a computer. Which of the following steps would most likely prevent future infections?

An organization’s network engineering team provides the support team with web proxy information that all workstations need in order to access external web pages. Which of the following should the support team change?

A network engineer is dealing with an emergency situation in which a wired network connection needs to be replaced. A facility manager tells the network engineer that the current connection goes underneath a carpet and must be rerouted. Which of the following is the best reason to reroute this connection?

options.text: Appropriate cable management removes a hazard.
Cleaning with a vacuum will create static electricity.
Labels for the cable routing are not appropriately displayed.
Walking over the cable can create intermittent issues.

stem: Which of the following depends on system time accuracy to function properly?

Users access an internal application through a browser website. When a user is browsing the site a message appears that states it is not safe. The message also displays an Advanced Options button to continue or close the site. During security training, all users were told to close any site that displays this message. Which of the following should the technician do to resolve the issue?

options.text: Add the site to a list of safe senders
Install a Secure Sockets Layer certificate for the site
Migrate the site to a different server
Move the site to a web-hosting company

stem: A user receives an unexpected text message containing a link to reset an expired password. Which of the following social engineering attacks is taking place?
A malicious actor uses multiple endpoints to target a single endpoint. Which of the following describes this threat?
A support specialist must apply a new application update to an entire organization. Which of the following is the first step in this process?

A systems administrator logs in to a developer's machine to update the system and notices a performance issue. To troubleshoot the issue, the administrator attempts to open Task Manager multiple times, but it does not open. Which of the following is most likely the cause of this issue?

options.text: A software development application is running
Windows Update Service is set to manual
The operating system has a malware infection
A page file was moved to D:\ drive

stem: A company computer is being repurposed within an organization. The existing configuration has a static IP address, but it is no longer required. Which of the following should a technician do to satisfy the network requirements?

options.text: Make a DHCP reservation for the computer
Create an exclusion in the existing IP scheme
Switch the NIC settings from manual to automatic
Change the currently assigned static IP

stem: Which of the following is most important for protecting intellectual property from being shared on social media platforms?

A technician needs to delete an application's local data from a specific user account, but when the technician navigates to the C:\Users\EmployeeA directory, the AppData folder is not present. Which of the following should the technician do to see the appropriate folder?

options.text: Grant full control permissions on the folder to everyone
Adjust the display options to show all file details
Change the settings to view hidden items
Log in to the workstation as a domain administrator

stem: A user's machine is infected with malware that the user's existing security software did not detect. Which of the following best explains the reason the infection was undetected?
A support technician must install software that allows a user to deliver a project status presentation to external stakeholders. Which of the following software types should the technician install?
Which of the following Microsoft Windows versions would most likely be installed on a server?
A technician is unable to join a computer to the Windows domain. However, the computer can ping the domain controller by IP address. Which of the following is the most likely reason?

options.text: IPv6 is enabled on the computer
The computer is not connected to the network

stem: Which of the following allows users to prevent malware installation and the disclosure of sensitive information?
A user reports that the time on their computer does not match the time on their VoIP phone. Which of the following should a technician do to fix the time difference?

options.text: Confirm the user is logging in to the domain
Manually set the time on the phone to match the computer
Download and install the latest BIOS update
Configure access to an available NTP server

stem: While working from home, the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) needs to open reports from accounting software. When the application opens, the CFO sees the error Unable to connect to database. Which of the following should the CFO do first?

options.text: Confirm the application is up to date

stem: A user is installing a third-party application on the latest macOS. The user receives a security warning that states the application is unsigned and cannot be installed. Which of the following settings should the user adjust to allow the installation?
A government client asks a technician to expunge several drives that contain confidential information. The technician must follow regulatory compliance. Which of the following is the best option?

An IT technician is attempting to install a video-rendering application for a client when the installation program halts. The technician sees an error message about the system not meeting the VRAM requirement. The system has a popular, integrated video solution and twice the required DRAM. Which of the following should the technician access to meet the VRAM requirement?
Which of the following methods is a way to superficially delete files on a hard drive?

A technician is troubleshooting the reason that an application is down. The technician verifies that a service that was running has unexpectedly stopped. The technician tries to manually start the service, but it fails to start. Which of the following is the cause of this issue?

options.text: The service is set to automatically start
The service account needs administrative rights
The service account is locked out
The service should be set to run under the system account

stem: A technician is working to restore a customer's access to a website. Which of the following commands should the technician use to determine the point of failure?
A technician wants to create new partitions on a device so that a user can keep work data and personal data separate. Which of the following tools should the technician use?
A user wants to use several used computers to set up a low-cost lab at home to study and test scripts for managing servers. Which of the following would be the best operating system choice?

A small company is experiencing unauthorized access attempts to its Windows workstations. The company suspects that some default security settings may be too permissive. Which of the following actions should an IT technician take?

A user reports that their smartphone frequently displays pop-ups that warn of security threats and recommend tools to protect against them. After tapping one of the pop-ups, the user notices that the smartphone’s battery drains faster. Which of the following should a technician recommend to resolve this issue?

options.text: Clear the smartphone’s browser cache and uninstall unknown applications.
Enable airplane mode and restart the smartphone.
Perform a factory reset on the smartphone.
Replace the SIM card and modify the network settings.

stem: A utility failure causes a workstation to immediately shut down. Which of the following would help prevent this from reoccurring?

A user’s Android smartphone frequently restarts when running a specific application. The smartphone is running the latest OS patch, and all applications are confirmed to be up to date. The issue began after the user installed several new applications the previous week. Which of the following steps should a technician take first?

options.text: Clear the storage cache for the crashing application.
Perform a factory reset on the smartphone.
Test the application on another smartphone.

stem: An end user’s computer is unable to start. A technician examines the machine and does not hear any unusual noises but determines that no OS is found. Which of the following is most likely corrupt?
A technician is working on multiple remote machines using a command line. Which of the following commands should the technician use to verify which SMB shares are currently mapped?

A user’s new laptop, which was advertised as gaming ready, is performing slowly when the user is playing a modern game. However, when the user is playing a less resource-demanding game, the user does not see any lag. Which of the following should a technician do to resolve the issue?
A technician wears a wrist strap while replacing RAM. Which of the following describes the purpose of the wrist strap during this task?
A systems administrator wants to manage a Linux server from a remote laptop using a disk management tool that is only accessible via the GUI. Which of the following should the administrator install?

An organization’s marketing department wants to use a new generative AI product. A technician reviews the company’s AI policy and notices the new product is not listed in the appropriate use section. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Inform the marketing department that the AI product cannot be used, as it is not within the company’s
Escalate the request to the chief technology office and legal department for appropriate approval.
Deploy the AI product to the marketing department for acceptable use testing.
Acquire additional information from the marketing department for a use case within the organization.

stem: A support technician receives a call from an upset customer. The customer continually and loudly interrupts the technician before the technician can ask clarifying questions or confirm details. Which of the following actions should the support technician take to handle the situation effectively and professionally? (Choose two).

options.text: Use active listening skills to ensure the customer feels heard and understood.
Offer immediate compensation for their troubles without checking policies.
Apologize for the inconvenience without understanding the issue.
Confront the customer about their tone and insist on a civil conversation.
Maintain a calm and empathetic tone throughout the conversation.
Transfer the call to a manager without addressing the customer’s concerns.

stem: A technician fails to remediate ransomware on a Windows PC. The user is asking for the fastest path for the PC to become operational again. Which of the following actions should the technician take next?

options.text: Educate the end user on safer browsing techniques.
Reimage the system from a good backup.

stem: A company wants to enforce the following: Administrators can add URLs to the Trusted URL list. Passwords will not be stored through the browser. When the browser is closed, all history will be saved. Security of the browser will be set to high. Specific URLs or ratings will be restricted from access. Which of the following is the best for the technician to configure?

A technician needs to install Windows 11 on a 4TB SSD. The company requirements state that the drive needs to be partitioned with at least five primary partitions. Which of the following should the technician use? (Choose two.)

A technician sees a certificate warning on a new website stating that the certificate source cannot be verified. The technician bypasses the warning. Which of the following must be done to prevent this warning from appearing for other users?

options.text: A trusted certificate authority must generate the certificate.
The certificate must be signed by the administrator.
A new certificate must be created from a local computer.
The certificate must be added to the personal root.

stem: A technician installed, configured, and hardened a SOHO firewall to meet a customer’s needs. The customer asks the technician what can be done to keep the firewall secure in the future. Which of the following should the technician recommend?

options.text: Changing all of the default passwords
Verifying all unneeded ports are disabled
Keeping the firewall in a secure location

stem: After a technician upgrades the RAM on a user's workstation, the system shows a No boot device found message. Which of the following is most likely the cause?

options.text: The installation disk is not available.
The SATA HDD power cable is disconnected.
The drive needs to be reformatted.
The boot order needs to be changed.

stem: A user is trying to install new software. The application downloads successfully, but when the user attempts to install the application, the user receives a prompt for credentials. Which of the following would the technician most likely do to resolve this issue?

options.text: Use a different web browser to download the application.
Contact the software vendor for support.

stem: An employee's personal smartphone was stolen. The employee's corporate email account is set up on the smartphone. Which of the following is the first action to take to prevent unauthorized users from accessing this email account?

options.text: Changing the password on the email account

stem: A technician must install a legacy business application on a new computer. The new computer does not meet the application's requirements. Which of the following steps should the technician take to ensure the application installs and runs correctly?

options.text: Use a virtual machine to emulate an older OS.
Run the installation in safe mode to avoid driver conflicts.
Increase the swap file size to manage potential memory issues.
Use an application compatibility toolkit to address any software conflicts.

stem: Which of the following commands is used to validate the IP settings of a Windows OS?

A technician is designing a solution to automatically save users' local documents, pictures, and files to the network. The network is in an Active Directory environment. Which of the following will the technician most likely do?

A user is unable to access an external vendor website from the corporate network. Which of the following Windows command-line tools should a technician use to determine where the issue is potentially occurring?
A technician wants to prevent electrical damage while disassembling a device. The technician turns off the device. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Place the computer on an antistatic mat.
Connect a wrist strap to a metal frame.

stem: A customer wants to format an external hard drive to work on both Windows and macOS. Which of the following filesystems is the best to use?

A user needs to test several software replacement possibilities. Part of the process involves installing the different software options on a corporate-imaged sandboxed PC. Which of the following is the best option to allow the user to install the required software?

options.text: Make the user a member of Domain Admins.
Add the user to the local Administrators group.
Let the user use credentials from another user who has rights.
Give the user the local, high-privileged account password.

stem: A technician inspects the following workstation configuration: The workstation is unable to open any external websites. The browser displays an error message that says that the site cannot be reached.

options.text: The wrong DNS suffix is assigned.
The workstation IP address is incorrect.
The default gateway is not set.

stem: Which of the following commands is used to manage files in a Linux OS?
A company requires technicians to verify that files downloaded from the internet have not been modified. Which of the following should the technicians use for validation?
A developer is using an AI tool to generate a complex sorting algorithm for a web application. Which of the following is the best choice to legally generate code in their application?

options.text: Use the generated code in their application silently
Insert comments in their application for the generated code
Credit the author of the generated code in their application
Check the sources the AI tool is using for copyrighted content

stem: Which of the following is required to have a central log-in for a Windows computer?
Due to recent security issues, the finance department requires a shorter screensaver timeout. Which of the following should a technician use to accomplish this task?

A user notices that their smartphone's data usage has increased significantly even when the device is not in use. The phone feels warm, and its battery drains quickly. Which of the following should the user do to address this issue?

options.text: Disable the Wi-Fi and mobile networks.
Reset the device to its factory defaults.

stem: A user is trying to install a preferred word processor on their work laptop, but the installation fails each time. Which of the following is most likely the cause of this failure?
A new software installation requires administrative privileges for deployment. Which of the following is the best way to provide the necessary permissions to install the software?

options.text: Adding the user to the local administrator group

stem: A customer calls the help desk to report issues with internet connectivity. The customer is frustrated because they have already spoken to other representatives who were unable to resolve their issue. A help desk technician quickly reviews the customer’s file and notices several prior unresolved tickets. Which of the following actions should the technician take to communicate with the customer properly and professionally?

options.text: Ask the customer to clarify the issue right away.
Escalate the issue to a higher-level support team without further conversation.
Listen to the customer's concerns and acknowledge their frustrations.
Explain to the customer that the previous technicians were following standard procedure.

stem: Which of the following is found in an SDS for a battery backup?
Which of the following file types allows macOS users to uninstall software completely by placing the file in the trash?

A user needs to download some files from a vendor website. Downloading the specific file type is blocked when using the Microsoft Edge web browser. A technician determines that the files the user wants to download are safe. Which of the following should the technician configure to allow these files to be downloaded?
Which of the following security measures addresses the issue of information exfiltration?
An administrator must configure computers for remote users. The computers will be shipped directly to users from the manufacturer. Which of the following solutions should the administrator use?
A high percentage of users at an office store documents on their local computers. The office needs to migrate to the next version of Windows. Which of the following methods should a technician use?

A SOHO customer purchases a Windows 11 computer. When the technician attempts to join the computer to the domain, the option is grayed out. Which of the following explains the reason the option is unavailable?

options.text: The computer OS needs to be updated to the latest version.
Network settings need to be changed on the Pro edition of Windows.
The computer needs to be restarted to apply new group policies.
The computer operating system is Home edition.

stem: A technician recently installed a hard drive from a decommissioned PC. The technician wants to repurpose it for data storage but is unable to delete all the partitions in the graphical disk management tool. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Reinstall the HDD in the previous computer and clear the BIOS password.
Start from a Linux rescue disk and remove all malware.
Utilize the command-line interface from an elevated prompt.
Return the HDD to the manufacturer for a low-level format.

stem: An engineer notices that many websites prompt users to input login and payment details. The engineer wants to require the browser to encrypt communications. Which of the following best helps to protect sensitive data?
