A senior administrator asks a help desk technician to run a set of commands on a remote network switch. After running the commands, the technician needs to collect the output and provide it to the administrator. Which of the following should the technician use to fulfill the administrator’s request?

A user cannot log in to their computer. A technician confirms that the user's account is unlocked and resets their password. The technician tries logging in with the new credentials but gets a trust relationship error. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Rejoin the device to the domain.
Verify that there is network connectivity.
Log in with a different account.

stem: A popular game frequently freezes and crashes on a mobile phone user's device. The user updates the OS. but the issue persists. The device is one year old and has plenty of free storage space. Which of the following is the most appropriate first step to troubleshoot this issue?

options.text: Changing the device's date and time settings

stem: Thousands of compromised machines are attempting to make fake purchases from an online store. Which of the following is taking place?
Which of the following file types is best for performing automated tasks on startup on a Windows computer?
An end user reports that their computer will not load Windows. Which of the following should a technician check after inspecting the computer hardware and verifying that it is working properly?
Which of the following best describes a security consequence of using software that is EOL?

options.text: The vendor will not support future features.
New vulnerabilities will not be patched.
Users will incur increased licensing costs.

stem: An end user sees frequent onscreen messages from a retail site they visited a week ago. A technician investigates and determines that the pop-up blocker is turned on. Which of the following should the technician do next?

options.text: Reset the browser to its default settings.
Turn off notifications in the browser.

stem: An end user is unable to print to a network printer but can access everything else on the network. Other users in the organization have no issues printing. A technician opens the print queue on the user’s computer and sees the job has failed. Which of the following is the next step to troubleshoot the issue?

options.text: Printing a test document from another computer on the network
Restarting the print spooler from services
Removing the printer from the computer and reinstalling it
Starting the computer again and attempting to print again

stem: An end user is unable to access the intranet. A technician needs to confirm whether the Windows web server is online and functioning. Which of the following default remote access technologies would the technician most likely use to remotely connect to the server?

A company's IT department discovers that unauthorized software has been installed on several workstations. The IT manager requests a review and an update of the workstation security posture, focusing on preventing future unauthorized software installations. Which of the following should the company do?

An organization notices that its employees often leave their desks without logging off their workstations, leading to unauthorized access by other staff members. Which of the following should the IT department do to address this issue?
Which of the following Linux commands is used to read another command's documentation?
Which of the following is provided to a user during MFA?
An employee's company smartphone restarts frequently after the employee installs a messaging application. Which of the following should an IT specialist do first to troubleshoot the issue?

options.text: Confirm whether the same issue occurs on a personal smartphone
Wipe the phone and reinstall the application
Uninstall the software and check the device for restarting issues

stem: An administrator must write a script that will output the OS name to a file. Which of the following commands is the best way to accomplish this task?

The Chief Information Officer (CIO) is overseeing a project to integrate existing business processes to an enterprise resource planning system. The CIO identifies the scope of the change and provides it to the IT department. Which of the following is the first change management procedure to perform before measuring the impact to the systems?

An administrator is creating user accounts for a new vendor contract. The contract states that the users can work only during certain times. Which of the following should the administrator implement to comply with this requirement?

options.text: Timeout policies by GPO user objects
Alerts on authentication attempts outside of SLA requirements
Account login restrictions set to the specified hours

stem: A user reports a critical application issue. The user tells the technician that a former IT employee previously resolved this same issue. Which of the following steps should the technician take first?

options.text: Consult the technician who previously solved the issue.
Escalate the issue to the software manufacturer to develop a patch.
Review the ticketing system for details related to the prior occurrence.
Open a case to document the issue and progress until the issue is resolved.

stem: A client is dissatisfied with the help desk and demands an immediate resolution for their unresolved ticket. Which of the following should the technician do first?

options.text: Actively listen to the client's concerns while assuring them that their issue is a priority.
Redirect the client’s call to a different department for further assistance.
Ask the client to submit a new support ticket to open a fresh case.
Politely end the call and contact a manager for further instructions.
